\tzpentry{ID5840}{Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5840 introduces Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu}[\boldsymbol{\omega}_{gyro}] = \eta_{\mu\nu} + h_{\mu\nu}^{(rotation)} \end{equation}
